DP.104.0000:
Have you checked out the GTS
in Jubilife City?\f
It uses the Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection!
I can’t explain it, but it’s wicked!
DP.104.0001:
Hello, do you have a Poffin Case?\f
If you haven’t got one, you really
must visit the Pokémon Fan Club.
DP.104.0002:
If you feed your Pokémon Poffins
routinely, you’ll be able to enter\r
Contests whenever you like.
DP.104.0003:
They’re saying that Gym Leader
Fantina’s not around.\f
Heh! She must’ve heard I’m around
and chickened out!
DP.104.0004:
Yeah, so the Gym Leader came back,
and I challenged her.\f
...She wiped the floor with us.
I have to heal up my team now...
